events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario involves Lockout/Tagout (LOTO) where no try-step verification was performed. This is a critical safety issue per OSHA 1910.147.

    "No try-step verification performed after applying lockout/tagout devices",
    "Energy isolation not confirmed before commencing servicing work",

  "actions": [
    "Stop all servicing work immediately",
    "Verify energy isolation by operating normal start/stop controls or testing for zero energy state",
    "Confirm all energy sources are de-energized and stored energy is released/blocked",
    "Re-verify isolation before resuming work",
    "Document the try-step verification in the LOTO procedure"
  ],
  "rationale": "OSHA 1910.147 requires verification of machine isolation from hazardous energy before any work begins. The absence of a try-step verification means workers may be exposed to unexpected energization, startup, or stored energy, creating a critical hazard. Work must halt until isolation is confirmed.",
  "references": ["OSHA 1910.147(d)(6) - Verification of isolation"]
